user.title: Set up Home Assistant Email Bridge
user.description: Create a local webhook receiver for fake email notifications. Recipient names map to Home Assistant notify services.

error.invalid_recipients: Recipients must be valid JSON. Each recipient needs notify_service or notify_services.

abort.already_configured: Home Assistant Email Bridge is already configured.

init.title: Home Assistant Email Bridge options
init.description: Manage endpoint/users. Each endpoint is a local fake email address mapped to one or more Home Assistant notification targets.

view_addresses.title: Local email addresses

add_recipient.title: Add endpoint/user
add_recipient.description: Create one endpoint/user. The endpoint name is the fake email local part, such as dad in dad@ha-notify.local. Choose the Home Assistant notification target from the list.

edit_recipient.title: Edit endpoint/user
edit_recipient.description: Choose one configured endpoint/user to edit.

edit_selected_recipient.title: Edit {recipient}
edit_selected_recipient.description: Update this endpoint/user's accepted email addresses and Home Assistant notification targets.

remove_recipient.title: Remove endpoint/user
remove_recipient.description: Remove a fake email endpoint/user mapping.

send_test.title: Test endpoint/user
send_test.description: Choose the endpoint/user that should receive the test.

send_test_message.title: Send full test message to {recipient}
send_test_message.description: This sends through the same dispatch path used by a real SMTP message. The destination email defaults to this endpoint/user's primary local email address.

error.invalid_recipients: Recipients must be valid JSON. Each recipient needs notify_service or notify_services.
error.invalid_notify_services: Fallback services must be comma-separated service names such as notify.mobile_app_dads_iphone,persistent_notification.create.
error.no_notify_service: No configured notify service was available for this recipient.
